description_long: This is a cylindrical metal barrel with a predominantly red and white color scheme, featuring the Esso logo prominently on its side. The barrel has a weathered appearance, with visible rust stains and patches of worn paint, suggesting prolonged outdoor or industrial use. The top surface includes a small red cap and faded graphics, possibly for branding or safety information. The structure is reinforced with three horizontal ribs or bands, providing additional strength and rigidity. There are no visible handles, and the lid appears to be fixed with a single bung opening for filling or emptying contents. The overall design and markings indicate it is likely used for storing or transporting oil or other industrial liquids.
description: A weathered red and white metal barrel with Esso branding, rust stains, and a small red cap on top. Reinforced with horizontal bands and designed for industrial liquid storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Esso logo, red and white paint, and the red cap on the lid.
description_view_1: Rear view with no logo, visible rust streaks, and faded paint, showing the plain side of the barrel.
description_view_2: Side view similar to the front, with the Esso logo visible and more pronounced rust stains near the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no logo, only the red and white paint and the red cap on the lid visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: steel reinforcement rings at top, middle, and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: Esso logo, faded graphics on lid, rust stains
